name: TreeItem
description:
An individual tree item that uses replace selection behavior.
Clicking selects the item and deselects others.
Use modifier keys (Ctrl/Cmd, Shift) for multi-select operations.
Renders a `<li>` element.

className.description:
CSS class applied to the element, or a function that
returns a class based on the component’s state.

render.description:
Allows you to replace the component’s HTML element
with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

Accepts a `ReactElement` or a function that returns the element to render.
render.detailedType:
| ReactElement
| ((
    props: HTMLProps,
    state: Tree.Item.State,
  ) => ReactElement)

data-selected.description: Present when the item is selected.

data-disabled.description: Present when the item is disabled.

data-collapsed.description: Present when the item is collapsed.

data-depth.description: The depth of the item in the tree hierarchy.

data-editing.description: Present when the item's label is being edited.

data-expandable.description: Present when the item has children and can be expanded.

data-expanded.description: Present when the item is expanded.

data-focused.description: Present when the item is focused.
